scenario.name: Basic Sipstone UAC
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:[NUM_A]@[local_ip];user=phone>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];user=phone> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Allow: INVITE,UPDATE,BYE,PRACK,INFO,OPTIONS,CANCEL,SUBSCRIBE,ACK,REFER,NOTIFY,REGISTER,PUBLISH,MESSAGE Require: 100rel Supported: 100rel,timer Session-Expires: 1800 Min-SE: 90 Max-Forwards: 70 P-Charging-Vector: icid-value=0;CS=AS;ORIGDLGID=1251635400;orig-ioi=[call_number];term-ioi=[call_number] Contact: <sip:[service]@10.20.158.52:5060> FlowID: 000404A8 Content-Length: [len] Content-Type: multipart/mixed;boundary=ssboundary-1_
--ssboundary-1_ Content-Type: application/sdp
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=SDP Data c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 18 8 100 13 a=rtpmap:100 TELEPHONE-EVENT/8000 a=ptime:20 a=maxptime:60 a=silenceSupp:on - - - - a=fmtp:18 annexb=yes
--ssboundary-1_ Content-Type: application/isup;version=isupbr97 Content-Disposition: signal;handling=required
\x01\x00\x60\x00\x0a\x03\x02\x09\x07\x81\x10\x4b\x00\x34\x35\x05\x08\x01\x00\x00
--ssboundary-1_--

ACK sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 1 ACK Contact: sip:[NUM_A]@[local_ip]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0
ACK sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 1 ACK Contact: sip:[NUM_A]@[local_ip]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0
